message:
bd-3bxhj.4.5: Style/theme translation with accessibility-safe upgrades

Implements style_translator.rs with 28 tests covering:
- Color translation: hex (#RRGGBB, #RGB), rgb(), named colors → Color::Rgb
- Typography: font-weight/style/decoration → StyleFlags (BOLD, ITALIC, etc.)
- Spacing quantization: px/rem/em → cell units with precision loss tracking
- Border classification: CSS border-style → BorderType (Plain/Rounded/Double/Thick)
- Layout translation: Flex/Grid/Absolute/Stack/Flow → ftui-layout strategies
- Theme generation: ThemeDecl → TranslatedTheme with color overrides
- Accessibility upgrades: WCAG contrast ratio checking with automatic boost
- Unsupported tokens: Shadow/Animation/Breakpoint/ZIndex with workaround hints

Also fixes compilation issues in capability_gap.rs (missing imports) and
gap_triage.rs (ambiguous float type) from other agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
